Baseline Description: Sturctural Assembly  fails some or all of validation tests
Response Description: FEA analysis of structure include load factors following DNV standards and considers extreme loading conditions such as uneven bottom and detalied CAD models for subsystem interfaces vlaidation tests to ensure strucutral integrityu meets specs incorporate structural redundancy

Baseline Description: Turbine Assembly fails some or all of validation tests

Secondary Risks: increased cost added structural elements could reduce turbine performance
Recommendations & Action Items: thorough design and analysis, utilizing third party expertise to confirm design
Contingency Plan: accept lower power output, system removal, inspection and turbine replacement if necessary

Risk Name: Higher cost for maintenance and logistical support required
Baseline Description: Higher cost for maintenance and logistical support required for final design and operations plan, including training and personnel requirements, external equipment and spares.
Response Description: Developing system requirements will be critical for determining technical scope for operations and maintenance technical support; involve local resources and include 3rd party input to accurately ascertain feasibility of proposed systems for logistical and technical requirements in remote environment. Develop trained leads during project who will be responsible for operating the systems after the project.
Residual Description: Higher cost risk should be lessened
Secondary Risks: complex supply chain and remote area logistics may still impact cost estimates
Recommendations & Action Items: structure contract to include incentives/penalties and FFP where possible
Contingency Plan: follow contractual provisions for higher costs, ensure lessons learned have path for improvement post-process
